name: test-utils
description: Cross-game utility commands for server info, rules, moderation, and simple economy administration.

discordLink.description: Discord invite or community link shown by /discord

serverInfoMessage.description: Optional extra server info line shown by /serverinfo

broadcastCurrencyGrants.description: Whether /givecurrency should broadcast to the whole server

broadcastKicks.description: Whether /kick should broadcast to the whole server

broadcastBans.description: Whether /ban should broadcast to the whole server

permissions.description: Allows a player to kick other players
Allows a player to ban other players
Allows a player to grant currency to players

serverinfo.helpText: Shows the server name, online player count, and optional server info message.

online.helpText: Shows how many players are online and lists up to 10 names.

discord.helpText: Shows the configured Discord link for this server.

rules.helpText: Shows the configured server rules as a numbered list.

kick.helpText: Usage: kick <player> [reason] — use your server's command prefix; target can be a player name or player ID and must be online on this server.

arguments.name: reason
arguments.helpText: Optional reason shown to the target and in broadcasts

ban.description: Ban a player temporarily or permanently
ban.helpText: Usage: ban <player> <duration> [reason] — use your server's command prefix; target can be a player name or player ID, including offline players already seen by this server network.

arguments.name: duration
arguments.helpText: perm/permanent or a value like 10m, 12h, 7d, or 2w

arguments.name: reason
arguments.helpText: Optional reason shown in the ban confirmation and broadcasts

givecurrency.helpText: Usage: givecurrency <player> <amount> — use your server's command prefix; target can be a player name or player ID and must currently be online on this server.
